inventory.documents.info.receipt.title: Receipt
inventory.documents.info.receipt.descrip: Used to bring goods into the warehouse. Each line requires a destination location.
inventory.documents.info.issue.title: Issue
inventory.documents.info.issue.descripti: Used to move goods out of the warehouse. Each line requires a source location.
inventory.documents.info.transfer.title: Transfer between locations
inventory.documents.info.transfer.descri: Used for internal goods movement. Each line requires a source and destination, and they must differ.
inventory.documents.info.adjustment.desc: Used to correct inventory quantity. Adjustment direction and line reason are required.
inventory.documents.info.return.title: Return
inventory.documents.info.return.descript: Used to return goods to the warehouse. Each line requires a destination location.
inventory.documents.info.qualityChange.d: Used to change item quality status. Source and destination qualities are required and must differ.
inventory.documents.info.conversion.desc: Used to consume components and produce the final item. Each line should fill only source or destination.

به پنل مدیریت مرکزی شرکت سالار صنعت نیوا: Welcome to the central management panel of Salar Sanat Nivad.
ماژول‌ها و زیرمنوها بر اساس نقش کاربر به: Modules and submenus are displayed dynamically based on the user's role.
نقشی از JWT استخراج نشد. لطفاً Role Clai: No role was extracted from the JWT. Please review the Role Claim in UserService.
برخی عملیات‌ها برای شما در دسترس نیست: Some actions are not available to you
بخشی از دکمه‌ها یا فرم‌ها براساس سطح دست: Some buttons or forms have been disabled based on your access level.
اگر برای انجام کار به این دسترسی نیاز دا: If you need this access to complete your work, coordinate with the system administrator or security team.
آیا از انجام این عملیات مطمئن هستید؟: Are you sure you want to perform this action?
Quantity must be greater than zero.
Source and destination locations must be different.
در سند تبدیل، هر ردیف باید یا خروجی باشد: In a conversion document, each line must be either an output or an input.
Source and destination qualities must be different.
Selecting a warehouse is required for the document.
Selecting a seller is required for the document.
At least one line is required for the document.
Used to receive goods into the warehouse. A destination location is required on each line.
Used to issue goods from the warehouse. A source location is required on each line.
برای جابه‌جایی داخلی کالا استفاده می‌شود: Used for internal stock movement. Source and destination are required on each line and must be different.
Used to correct stock quantity. Adjustment direction and line reason are required.
Used to return goods to the warehouse. A destination location is required on each line.
برای تغییر وضعیت کیفی کالا استفاده می‌شو: Used to change the quality status of goods. Source and destination qualities are required and must be different.
برای مصرف اجزای سازنده و تولید کالای نها: Used to consume component items and produce the final item. Fill only one of source or destination on each line.
The UOM is filled from the variant base UOM.
